# daytona_organization_otel_config (Data Source)

Reads OpenTelemetry export configuration for a Daytona organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_organization_otel_config" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.

### Read-Only

- `endpoint` (String) OpenTelemetry collector endpoint.
- `headers` (Map of String, Sensitive) OpenTelemetry request headers.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
